scripts.stack:up:homelab: FRONTEND_PORT=3000 docker compose -p collectz-homelab --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.homelab.yml up -d --build
scripts.stack:up:platform: FRONTEND_PORT=3100 docker compose -p collectz-platform --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.platform.yml up -d --build
scripts.stack:down:homelab: docker compose -p collectz-homelab --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.homelab.yml down
scripts.stack:down:platform: docker compose -p collectz-platform --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.platform.yml down
scripts.stack:ps:homelab: docker compose -p collectz-homelab --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.homelab.yml ps
scripts.stack:ps:platform: docker compose -p collectz-platform --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.platform.yml ps
scripts.test:edition-boundaries:local: docker compose -p collectz-homelab --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.homelab.yml exec -T -e BASE_URL=http://frontend:3000 backend npm run test:homelab-edition-boundary && docker compose -p collectz-platform --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.platform.yml exec -T -e BASE_URL=http://frontend:3000 backend npm run test:platform-edition-boundary
